## 类型

- [ ] 链接失效
- [ ] 内容补充
- [ ] 示例改进
- [ ] 翻译
- [ ] 其他：___

- [ ] `README.md`

- [ ] `prompts/*`
- [ ] `skills/*`

- [ ] 示例页（`blog.html` / `company.html` / `resume.html` / `report.html`）
